title: Fresh Berries Decorative Jar Candle, 7.6 x 7.6 cm, 220g, Indoor Use, Home Fragrance (Fresh Berry)
features: BURN TIME: Long-lasting fragrant candle that burns for up to 15 hours, perfect for creating a cosy atmosphere in your home.
FRESH BERRIES FRAGRANCE: Delightful aromatic blend featuring sweet and fruity berry notes that fill your space with a refreshing scent.
COMPACT SIZE: Measures 7.6 cm in width and height, with a convenient jar design that fits perfectly on any shelf or table.
DECORATIVE DESIGN: Stylish jar candle that serves as both a fragrant home accessory and an elegant decorative piece.
PORTABLE: Lightweight at just 220 grams, making it easy to move and position anywhere in your home for optimal ambience.
description: Transform your living space with the Bloome Fresh Berries Decorative Candle, a charming jar candle that combines style and fragrance. This delightful home accessory measures 7.6 cm in width and height, making it a perfectly proportioned accent piece for any room. The captivating Fresh Berries scent creates an inviting atmosphere, whilst the elegant jar design adds a decorative touch to your décor. With up to 15 hours of burning time, this candle provides lasting ambience for multiple occasions. The compact size makes it ideal for placing on coffee tables, mantels, or bedside tables, allowing you to create the perfect mood in any corner of your home. The sturdy glass jar contains the scented wax safely, making it both practical and aesthetically pleasing. Whether you're seeking to create a cosy evening atmosphere or add a decorative element to your space, this candle delivers both form and function.
